3278420.name: Robot Wars
3278420.description:
Robot Wars is an exciting game where players take control of one of three detailed battle robots and engage in combat on the arena. Each robot has unique attack characteristics, making the battles engaging and requiring thoughtful tactics. Players can change their robots' colors, accumulate points, and level up, improving their skills as they play.

The enemies are controlled by advanced AI: they can detect the player during attacks and react actively, adding a challenging element to the gameplay. Success in battles will require focus and the ability to leverage the strengths of the chosen robot. "Robot Wars" also features a well-designed system for saving and loading progress, with an interface that blends aesthetics and usability, providing players with intuitive controls for maximum enjoyment of the game.
3278420.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
